signal_sql: CASE WHEN taker_buy_volume > 0 AND count >= 100 THEN (0.5 * ((taker_buy_quote_volume / taker_buy_volume - close) / close) + 0.25 * LAG((taker_buy_quote_volume / taker_buy_volume - close) / close, 1) OVER w + 0.25 * LAG((taker_buy_quote_volume / taker_buy_volume - close) / close, 2) OVER w) ELSE NULL END
